title: Wildvine: Alien Evolution Addon
description:
An Addon for the Ben 10 Minecraft mod, Alien Evolution which adds the Florauna species (AKA Wildvine)

Currently only obtainable through mistransformation
body:
This addonpack adds a new possible transformation to the **Omnitrix** provided by **Alien Evolution!**
## Florauna
The Florauna transformation is currently only unlockable via mistransformation
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/b10pLaRngJ8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
